titleStmt.title: SII 5.127: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 127. (A.R. No. 512-A of 1893). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[śakava¨rṣaṁbu]lu 1222 gunēṁṭi śā¨rvvarisaṁvvatsara pauṣya śuddha paṁccā
deśiyu sōmavāramunāṁḍu Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtikālamaṁdu
kṣīrārāmēśvaraśrīmanmahādēvuniki svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuva
¨rddhanamahārājulaina mahādēvacakrava¨rtti kūṁttuṟu OdayamahādēviAmma
ṁgāru tama pu¨rṣuṁḍaina svasti sahasrabāhupratāpavī¨ryyaguṇasaṁppa
nnulaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kōna gaṇapaddēvarājunakunnu tamaku
ṁnnu puṇyamugānu peṭṭina Akhaṁḍadīpānaku mōdālu 50 Ī divya kṣē
tramu moṭṭapa¨rtti dakṣiṇapuṁ bolāna mālakoṭṭi tū¨rppuna
kha 1 na 10 I yuri Uttarāna koṁḍāvalōna sāniguṁṭa tū
¨rppuna sēnu kha 1 na 10 berasi kha 3 vīniṁ jēkoni koḍa maṁcci
li kēta koḍku dēvanabōṁḍu nitya naṁddimānika mā neI Asaṁdrā
¨rkkasthāIgā naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu I bhōIniki moṭṭapa¨rtti yuttara
puvāḍanu rāvi tū¨rppuna Ilupaṭṭunu peḍalūnu Āsaṁdrā¨rkkastha
Igāṁ beṭṭitimi . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭi
¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ.*] saraṇōju likhitaṁ śrī
Digital edition of SII 5.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
